title: Add phx-debounce and used_input? to a search form
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/search_form_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.SearchFormLive) that has a search form with phx-change="search" and a text input with phx-debounce="300". Also handle the case where the user hasn't submitted anything yet — only show results when used_input?(@form[:q]) is true. mount/3 builds @form via to_form(%{"q" => ""}).
tier_rationale: Combines debounce + used_input? — two lesser-known attributes.
